caption: the door that has a painting to the left of it

global_need_reason: The query involves a directional spatial relation ('left of') between two objects, and while the local views provide some context, the full spatial layout including the relative positions of the door and painting requires a broader scene understanding. The global view helps confirm that the painting is indeed to the left of the door, which cannot be reliably determined from local crops alone.
